guidance.bestFor: Bourbon or coffee pairing, experienced smoker wanting Liga complexity without broadleaf heaviness.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants full body, maximum strength, or Liga Privada No. 9–class broadleaf power — H99 is the Connecticut-hybrid sub-line, not the maduro flagship.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user wants Drew Estate complexity with Connecticut sweetness — not No. 9 strength.
